You need an instant ease
From the life where you got plenty
Of every hurt and heartbreak
You just take it all to the face

But it‚Äôs much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who threw dirt on your name

Had friends but they was picking on me
Always thinking why my lips so big?
Was I too dark? Can they sense my fears?

These gay thoughts would always haunt me
I prayed God would take it from me
It‚Äôs hard for you when you‚Äôre fighting
And nobody knows it when you‚Äôre silent 

I‚Äôd be by the phone
Stanning Nicki morning into dawn
Only place I felt like I belonged
Strangers make you feel so loved, you know? 

And I‚Äôm happy by the way
That I made that jump, that leap of faith
I‚Äôm happy that it all worked out for me
Imma make my fans so proud of me, (ohhhh)

From the life where you got plenty

But it‚Äôs much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who throw dirt on your name 

oooohhh

unooooh

LETRA

(Amenazzy)
Aaaaaahhh Amenazzy, a ese novio la dejo, ahora quiere despegar la mente y jangueal‚Äô,
Cansada de trabajar, de la monoton√≠a de todos los d√≠as,
Sali√≥, se fue, se ve que est√° mejor ahora que est√° sin √©l, 
Dice que no vuelve pa atr√°s,
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Que prefiere estar sola, que mal acompa√Īada otra vez.

(Jay Wheeler)
Ella dice que los amores, son de novela,
Muchos le tiran, pero ella r√°pido los cancela,
Y si vieras la foto que sube en traje de ba√Īo, no quiere amores, porque ya le hicieron da√Īo,
Lleva soltera m√°s de un a√Īo, su ex le escribe dici√©ndole te extra√Īo, 
Pero, pichea porque dice, que sola est√° mejor 
y frontea, no quiere saber nada de amor
 y pichea, porque dice que soltera est√° mejor  
Frontea, no quiere saber nada de amor.

(Amenazzy)
Sali√≥, se fue, se ve que est√° mejor, 
Ahora que est√° sin √©l, 
dice que no vuelve pa atr√°s,

(Jay Wheeler)
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Prefiere estar sola, que mal acompa√Īada otra vez.

(Amenazzy)

El coraz√≥n vac√≠o, pero la copa est√° llena, 
culo grande, piel canela, 
disfruta la vida ahora que est√° soltera, 
que est√° libre y puede hacer lo que quiera (eyyy), 
anda con una amiga que es su c√≥mplice, 
si se pasan de tragos, van a besarse, 
por ahora solo quiere liberarse, 
que nadie le recuerde al bobo ese, 
ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hac√≠a (aahhh), 
ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d√≠a, 
ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hac√≠a (aahhh), 
ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d√≠a.

(Jay Wheeler)
Sali√≥, se fue, 
Se ve que est√° mejor, ahora que est√° sin √©l, 
Dice que no vuelve pa‚Äô atr√°s.

(Amenazzy)
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Que prefiere estar sola, 
Que mal acompa√Īada otra vez.
Suena de fondo

(Ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hacia aahhh, ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d√≠a,)

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - The Outside (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots lyric video for ‚ÄúThe Outside‚ÄĚ from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream/Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

LYRICS
I‚Äôm already bored,
I‚Äôm pretty sure I‚Äôve seen this one before,
I‚Äôve got a long drive, I‚Äôll tape my eyes,
So I don‚Äôt fall asleep again,
Singing out.

Up and down,
They‚Äôre nodding,
Heads are moving up and down,
You got it,
Everybody stand in line,
One by one, take a hit, join the club,
Kids will try to take my vibes,
Or am I on the outside?

I‚Äôve got a long drive, I‚Äôll tape my eyes,
So I don‚Äôt fall asleep again,
Singing out.

I am a Megalodon, oceans feeling like a pond,
Swimming like a beast, underneath they be clinging on,
Meteoric rise, in prehistoric times,
Now that meteor is coming, coming.
I am Megatron, cogs I‚Äôm stepping on,
Then the little cogs got together, start a renaissance,
Switched it up on me, fuel efficiency,
On fumes I am running, running, running.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚ÄĒ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.description:

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com

LYRICS
Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Lose my sense a time or two
Weeks feel like days
Medicate in the afternoon.
And I just want to know
Have you lost your footing too?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

These are my dancing shoes.
We paint the town.

Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

(Feeling great)
Life moves slow on the ocean floor.

I can't feel the waves anymore.
Did the tide forget to move?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Twenty One Pilots lyric video for "Saturday" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

LYRICS
Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Lose my sense a time or two
Weeks feel like days
Medicate in the afternoon.
And I just want to know
Have you lost your footing too?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Ooh you're good.
These are my dancing shoes.
We paint the town.
Ooh you're good.
Thought I would dance with you.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

(Feeling great)
Life moves slow on the ocean floor.
(Feeling great)
I can't feel the waves anymore.
Did the tide forget to move?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

snippet.title: Giro d‚ÄôItalia 2021 | Stage 11 | Last Km
snippet.description:
#Giro #Giroditalia #LastKM 

MAURO SCHMID VINCE LA TAPPA 11 DEL GIRO D‚ÄôITALIA 
EGAN BERNAL AUMENTA IL VANTAGGIO IN CLASSIFICA GENERALE  
Mauro Schmid (Team Qhubeka Assos) ha vinto la tappa 11 del centoquattresimo Giro d'Italia, la Perugia - Montalcino (Brunello di Montalcino Wine Stage), di 162 km. Al secondo e terzo posto si sono classificati rispettivamente i compagni di fuga Alessandro Covi (UAE Team Emirates) e Harm Vanhoucke (Lotto Soudal).

La Maglia Rosa Egan Bernal (Ineos Grenadiers) √® arrivato dopo 3'09" ed ha aumentato il vantaggio in classifica generale mentre Remco Evenepoel (Deceuninck - Quick-Step) ha tagliato il traguardo a 5'17" dal vincitore.

MAURO SCHMID WINS STAGE 11 OF THE GIRO D‚ÄôITALIA 
EGAN BERNAL INCREASES HIS LEAD IN THE GC
Mauro Schmid (Team Qhubeka Assos) has won Stage 11 of the 104th Giro d'Italia, 162km from Perugia to Montalcino (The Brunello di Montalcino Wine Stage). Breakaway companions Alessandro Covi (UAE Team Emirates) and Harm Vanhoucke (Lotto Soudal) finished second and third, respectively.

The Maglia Rosa Egan Bernal (Ineos Grenadiers) crossed the line after 3'09" and increased his lead in the GC. Remco Evenepoel (Deceuninck - Quick-Step) finished at 5'17" down from the stage winner.

Alexis y Fido, Yandel ‚Äď ‚ÄėTe Reto‚Äô (Official Video)

LYRICS 

Fido: Simple, de aqu√≠ t√ļ no te vas, deja que el DJ ponga otra m√°s.
Yandel: No pierdas el tiempo, quiero que te corras el riesgo,
Fido:Lista pa‚Äô que perrees contra el ceto

snippet.title: Machu Picchu, el lugar m√°s espectacular de Sudam√©rica
snippet.description:
Escondido entre dos monta√Īas en los Andes peruanos, Machu Picchu es un s√≠mbolo de la grandeza de la civilizaci√≥n incaica. Los sistemas de cultivos, los caminos y la incre√≠ble arquitectura de los incas se ve reflejada en este lugar. 

El lugar fue redescubierto reci√©n en 1911 por un investigador estadounidense, aunque se cree que la gente del lugar ya lo conoc√≠a. Igualmente, reci√©n ah√≠ tom√≥ la fama mundial que merece, m√°s de tres siglos despu√©s de haber sido abandonado. 

Machu Picchu es una de las grandes atracciones tur√≠sticas de Sudam√©rica. Antes de la pandemia, un mill√≥n y medio de personas visitaban las ruinas cada a√Īo. Los amantes del trekking y la naturaleza podr√°n recorrer tambi√©n los distintos caminos trazados en la √©poca incaica.

en.title: Machu Picchu, the most spectacular place in South America
en.description:
Hidden between two mountains in the Peruvian Andes, Machu Picchu is a symbol of the greatness of the Inca civilization. The farming systems, the roads and the incredible architecture of the Incas are reflected in this place.

The place was only rediscovered in 1911 by an American researcher, although it is believed that the locals already knew it. Likewise, it was only there that it took on the world fame it deserves, more than three centuries after being abandoned.

Machu Picchu is one of the great tourist attractions in South America. Before the pandemic, one and a half million people visited the ruins every year. Lovers of trekking and nature will also be able to travel the different paths traced in Inca times.


ūüĆé Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet

Los bombardeos se produjeron en respuesta al lanzamiento de m√°s de 400 cohetes desde Gaza hacia Jerusal√©n, Tel Aviv, Ashkelon y Lod.
El pre√°mbulo de esta escalada militar fueron los enfrentamientos entre fuerzas israel√≠es y palestinos en Jerusal√©n, que dejaron centenares de heridos.

snippet.description:
#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #BRITAwards2021
Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-KZfRV8c13fOCkhXdLiQ?sub_confirmation=1

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaoXT_LJuwEyESQlctWNDCwD

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.
